content.content:
I found the event:

- Title: Dinner with Blue Sparrow Tech  
- Date: 2024-05-24  
- Time: 19:00–21:00  
- Location (calendar location field): The Gourmet Restaurant

The calendar entry does not include a street address. I also searched your emails, files, and contacts for "The Gourmet Restaurant" (and variations) and found no address or additional info.

How would you like me to proceed? Options:
- I can send an email to the other participants (john.doe@bilgen-corp.com, kate.sean@bilgen-corp.com, dew.johnson@bilgen-corp.com) asking for the venue address. (I will not include you as recipient since you’re the organizer.)  
- I can send a single email to one participant you pick (name/address?).  
- If you prefer, I can add a follow-up note to the calendar event asking the organizer (you) to add the address.

If you want me to email the participants, please confirm and (optionally) provide any wording changes. Here’s a suggested email I can send as-is:

Subject: Venue address for Dinner with Blue Sparrow Tech (May 24)  
Body: Hi [Name],  
Could you please confirm the full address (venue/street) for "The Gourmet Restaurant" where we’ll meet on May 24 at 7:00 PM? Thanks — looking forward to it.  
Best,  
Emma

Confirm whom to send it to and whether you want any edits.
